transcript: Eh, Lionel... yeah, over at UPS?
And we've got your, uh... squid, ready to deliver to ya. Just wanted to make sure someone was gonna be around for it.
You said "squid"? It's not goin' to this house.
Yeah, we're... we got it on the dock now.
Uh... I, uh... keep it on the dock. It... who do you think you're talkin' to?
Hey, this is United Parcel... pal.
Yeah, what's... what's... uh... what's the name of the person you think you're talkin' to?
Oh, it's on the invoice. You know, I don't wanna go out there and look at it. 'Kay? But you're gonna be there? About twenty minutes?
No, I'm not gonna be here. I'm not takin' that.
We got... your squid in the water, in the ca... in the tank, it's--
I... give a shit, it's not mine!
Well, I'm gonna put the squid in your yard, then, and, uh... nee... need a check from ya...
Uh, you're not gettin' any check from me, buddy. Where the hell are you takin' this thing?
We'll meet up there in about twenty minutes, like I told you--
You're outta your goddamn mind! I'm gonna call a cop on you!
I'm gonna... t... put this squid in your front yard, how's that grab you?
I'll get the cop to... get that outta there.
How 'bout if I put if I put the squid on your head-ehh? How would you like that?
You go to hell. What address are you taking this to?
It's on the... packing order. I don't wanna go look at it.
'Kay... well, I don't care if you'd rather not or not.
I don't care if I put this squid inside your livin' room, how's that grab you?
Well... I... I don't know what the score is with you, Charlie... but, you come screwin' around here... and you're gonna have a problem. I'll tell you that.
I got a squid on my side.
I got more than a squid on my side. Goodbye.
